name: hello-world

scripts.build: node -e "const manifest=require(\"./manifest.json\"); require(\"esbuild\").build({ entryPoints: [\"main.ts\"], outfile: manifest.main, bundle: true, format: \"cjs\", platform: \"node\", target: \"node16\", minify: true }).catch((error) => { console.error(error.message); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.release:build: npm run release:verify-version && npm run package
scripts.start: node -e "const { spawn } = require(\"node:child_process\"); const manifest=require(\"./manifest.json\"); const child=spawn(process.execPath,[manifest.main],{stdio:\"inherit\"}); child.on(\"exit\",(code)=>process.exit(code ?? 0)); child.on(\"error\",(error)=>{ console.error(error.message); process.exit(1); })"

author: DotX Team
description: A simple hello world plugin for Dot X
